outputs.description: Event type Varonis.Event.UTCTime Date
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.Type

outputs.description: Varonis.Event.Status Filters according to the status of the event. Options are: - Fail
outputs.name: Event time UTC format

outputs.description: Varonis.Event.Description Description of the activity Varonis.Event.Country
outputs.name: - Success

outputs.description: Name of the country from which the event occurred Varonis.Event.State Name of the state or regional subdivision from which the event occurred
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Device external IP Varonis.Event.Details.IsBlacklist Whether any of the geographical locations from which an alerted activity originated was on the blacklist at the time the activity occurred
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.ExternalIP

outputs.description: Type of operation that occurred during the event. Options are: - Accessed - Added
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.Details.Operation

outputs.description: - Removed - Sent - Received
outputs.name: - Changed

outputs.description: Varonis.Event.ByUser.Name Name of the user that triggered the event Varonis.Event.ByUser.UserType
outputs.name: - Requested

outputs.description: Type of account, i.e., user or computer Varonis.Event.ByUser.UserAccountType Logon name used to support clients and servers running earlier versions of the Windows operating system, such as Windows NT 4.0. In the dashboards (other than the Alert dashboard), this is the SAM account name of the user or group
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Domain of the user that triggered the event Varonis.Event. ByUser.DisabledAccount Whether the account is disabled
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.ByUser.Domain

outputs.description: Whether the account is stale Varonis.Event.ByUser.LockoutAccounts Whether the account is lockout
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.ByUser.StaleAccount

outputs.description: Source IP of the device triggered the event Varonis.Event. IsMaliciousIP Whether the IP is known to be malicious
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.SourceIP

outputs.description: Reputation score of the IP. The score is a numeric value from 1-100 Varonis.Event.IPThreatType List of threat types associated with the IP
outputs.name: Varonis.Event. IPReputation

outputs.description: Name of object on which the event was performed Varonis.Event.OnObject.ObjectType Type of object on which the event was performed
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.Name

outputs.description: Type of platform on which the server resides. For example, Windows, Exchange, or SharePoint Varonis.Event.OnObject.IsSensitive Indicates whether the resource on which the event was performed is sensitive
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.Platform

outputs.description: File server of object on which the event was performed Varonis.Event.OnObject.IsDisabledAccount Whether the account is disabled
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.FileServerOrDomain

outputs.description: Whether the account is lockout Varonis.Event.OnObject.SAMAccountName Logon name used to support clients and servers running earlier versions of the Windows operating system, such as Windows NT 4.0. In the dashboards (other than the Alert dashboard), this is the SAM account name of the user or group
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.IsLockOutAccount

outputs.description: Specified type of privileged account. Options are: - Service accounts
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.UserAccountType

outputs.description: - Executive accounts - Test accounts Varonis.Event.OnObject.DestinationIP
outputs.name: - Admin accounts

outputs.description: Destination IP address within the organization Varonis.Event.OnObject.DestinationDevice Destination host name for relevant services
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Path of asset Varonis.Pagination.Page Current page number requested by user
outputs.name: Varonis.Event.OnObject.Path

outputs.description: Number of records on the page
outputs.name: Varonis.Pagination.PageSize
